name: Smono 4 Pro
summary: An affordable conduction dry-herb vaporiser with a glass mouthpiece and large battery.
description: The Smono 4 Pro is a straightforward conduction dry-herb device with adjustable temperature from 160–221°C and a fast heat-up of around 20 seconds. A 3000mAh battery gives plenty of runtime, and the glass mouthpiece keeps draws smooth and flavour clean — handle it with care, as glass can break. The discreet aluminium body slips into a pocket easily. It suits a patient who wants a dependable, no-frills vaporiser at a low price. As a conduction device it's best loaded and used in one go rather than left half-finished.
